use_cases: Website header search with engaging gooey filter animations for premium feel
Dashboard global search with fluid morphing transitions and blur effects
E-commerce product search with visually distinctive interactive design
Documentation or help center search with smooth Framer Motion animations
Navigation search bar with expandablegooey effect on focus
ai_summary: A visually striking animated search bar component featuring a unique SVG gooey filter effect that creates fluid, morphing transitions when interacting. Built with Framer Motion, it provides smooth animations including blur-to-focus transitions with spring physics and bounce effects. The component includes a search icon with animated entry/exit states, loading state support, and filter functionality with predefined suggestions. Perfect for SaaS dashboards, documentation sites, or any interface requiring an engaging, premium-feeling search experience with distinctive visual flair.
